test_cases.test_case: Successful login with valid credentials
preconditions: User has a registered account with valid email and password
steps: 1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Enter a valid email/username in the Email/Username field
3. Enter the correct password in the Password field
4. Click the Sign In button
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Signed in successfully.' and redirects to the Accounts Overview page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt login with incorrect password
preconditions: User has a registered account with valid email and an incorrect password
steps: 1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Enter a valid email/username in the Email/Username field
3. Enter an incorrect password in the Password field
4. Click the Sign In button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Incorrect email or password. Please try again.' is displayed; the password field is cleared

test_cases.test_case: Attempt login with unregistered email
preconditions: User has not registered an account
steps: 1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Enter an unregistered email/username in the Email/Username field
3. Enter any password in the Password field
4. Click the Sign In button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Incorrect email or password. Please try again.' is displayed; the password field is cleared

test_cases.test_case: Attempt login with minimum password length
preconditions: User has a registered account with valid email and a password of exactly 8 characters
steps: 1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Enter a valid email/username in the Email/Username field
3. Enter a password that is exactly 8 characters long, containing uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
4. Click the Sign In button
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Signed in successfully.' and redirects to the Accounts Overview page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt login with empty Email/Username field
steps: 1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Leave the Email/Username field empty
3. Enter a valid password in the Password field
4. Click the Sign In button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Incorrect email or password. Please try again.' is displayed; the password field is cleared

test_cases.test_case: Successful registration with valid inputs
steps: 1. Navigate to the Registration page
2. Enter 'John' in the First Name field
3. Enter 'Doe' in the Last Name field
4. Enter '123 Main St' in the Street Address field
5. Enter 'Anytown' in the City field
6. Select 'California' from the State dropdown
7. Enter '12345' in the ZIP Code field
8. Enter '(123) 456-7890' in the Phone Number field
9. Enter '123-45-6789' in the Social Security Number field
10. Enter 'john.doe@example.com' in the Username field
11. Enter 'Password123' in the Password field
12. Enter 'Password123' in the Confirm Password field
13. Click the Register button
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Account created successfully — please sign in,' and redirects to the login page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt registration with invalid email format for Username
steps: 1. Navigate to the Registration page
2. Enter 'John' in the First Name field
3. Enter 'Doe' in the Last Name field
4. Enter '123 Main St' in the Street Address field
5. Enter 'Anytown' in the City field
6. Select 'California' from the State dropdown
7. Enter '12345' in the ZIP Code field
8. Enter '(123) 456-7890' in the Phone Number field
9. Enter '123-45-6789' in the Social Security Number field
10. Enter 'john.doeexample.com' in the Username field
11. Enter 'Password123' in the Password field
12. Enter 'Password123' in the Confirm Password field
13. Click the Register button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Invalid email format' is displayed; registration is not processed

test_cases.test_case: Attempt registration with mismatched Password and Confirm Password
steps: 1. Navigate to the Registration page
2. Enter 'John' in the First Name field
3. Enter 'Doe' in the Last Name field
4. Enter '123 Main St' in the Street Address field
5. Enter 'Anytown' in the City field
6. Select 'California' from the State dropdown
7. Enter '12345' in the ZIP Code field
8. Enter '(123) 456-7890' in the Phone Number field
9. Enter '123-45-6789' in the Social Security Number field
10. Enter 'john.doe@example.com' in the Username field
11. Enter 'Password123' in the Password field
12. Enter 'Password321' in the Confirm Password field
13. Click the Register button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Passwords do not match' is displayed; registration is not processed

test_cases.test_case: Attempt registration with minimum length password
steps: 1. Navigate to the Registration page
2. Enter 'John' in the First Name field
3. Enter 'Doe' in the Last Name field
4. Enter '123 Main St' in the Street Address field
5. Enter 'Anytown' in the City field
6. Select 'California' from the State dropdown
7. Enter '12345' in the ZIP Code field
8. Enter '(123) 456-7890' in the Phone Number field
9. Enter '123-45-6789' in the Social Security Number field
10. Enter 'john.doe@example.com' in the Username field
11. Enter 'Pass123' in the Password field
12. Enter 'Pass123' in the Confirm Password field
13. Click the Register button
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Account created successfully — please sign in,' and redirects to the login page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt registration with maximum length for Username
steps: 1. Navigate to the Registration page
2. Enter 'John' in the First Name field
3. Enter 'Doe' in the Last Name field
4. Enter '123 Main St' in the Street Address field
5. Enter 'Anytown' in the City field
6. Select 'California' from the State dropdown
7. Enter '12345' in the ZIP Code field
8. Enter '(123) 456-7890' in the Phone Number field
9. Enter '123-45-6789' in the Social Security Number field
10. Enter 'john.doe.longusername@example.com' in the Username field
11. Enter 'Password123' in the Password field
12. Enter 'Password123' in the Confirm Password field
13. Click the Register button
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Account created successfully — please sign in,' and redirects to the login page

test_cases.test_case: View Accounts Overview with multiple accounts
steps: 1. Navigate to Accounts Overview from the dashboard
2. Observe the welcome message with the user's name
3. Review the table displaying all customer accounts
test_cases.expected_result: The page shows a welcome message with the user's name and a table listing all accounts with correct details including Account Number, Account Type, Current Balance, Account Status, and Open Date

test_cases.test_case: View Accounts Overview without being logged in
steps: 1. Attempt to navigate to Accounts Overview
test_cases.expected_result: The user is redirected to the login page with an error message indicating that login is required

test_cases.test_case: View Accounts Overview with a single account
steps: 1. Navigate to Accounts Overview from the dashboard
2. Observe the table displaying the single account
test_cases.expected_result: The page shows a welcome message with the user's name and a table with one account entry, displaying all details correctly including masked Account Number

test_cases.test_case: View Accounts Overview with maximum number of accounts
preconditions: User has the maximum allowed number of accounts
steps: 1. Navigate to Accounts Overview from the dashboard
2. Observe the table displaying all accounts
test_cases.expected_result: The page shows a welcome message with the user's name and a table listing all accounts correctly, with the total balance footer reflecting the sum of all accounts

test_cases.test_case: Open a Checking account with valid initial deposit
preconditions: A funding account with at least $25 exists
steps: 1. Navigate to Open New Account
2. Select the Checking account type card
3. Enter 25 in the Initial Deposit Amount field
4. Select <funding account> from the Funding Source Account dropdown
5. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Account opened successfully!' and the user is redirected to Accounts Overview where the new Checking account appears

test_cases.test_case: Open a Savings account with valid initial deposit
preconditions: A funding account with at least $100 exists
steps: 1. Navigate to Open New Account
2. Select the Savings account type card
3. Enter 100 in the Initial Deposit Amount field
4. Select <funding account> from the Funding Source Account dropdown
5. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Account opened successfully!' and the user is redirected to Accounts Overview where the new Savings account appears

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to open a Checking account with insufficient initial deposit
preconditions: A funding account with less than $25 exists
steps: 1. Navigate to Open New Account
2. Select the Checking account type card
3. Enter 20 in the Initial Deposit Amount field
4. Select <funding account> from the Funding Source Account dropdown
5. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Minimum deposit for Checking account is $25' is displayed; no account is opened

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to open a Savings account with insufficient initial deposit
preconditions: A funding account with less than $100 exists
steps: 1. Navigate to Open New Account
2. Select the Savings account type card
3. Enter 50 in the Initial Deposit Amount field
4. Select <funding account> from the Funding Source Account dropdown
5. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Minimum deposit for Savings account is $100' is displayed; no account is opened

test_cases.test_case: Open a Checking account with the exact minimum deposit amount
preconditions: A funding account with at least $25 exists
steps: 1. Navigate to Open New Account
2. Select the Checking account type card
3. Enter exactly 25 in the Initial Deposit Amount field
4. Select <funding account> from the Funding Source Account dropdown
5. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Account opened successfully!' and the user is redirected to Accounts Overview where the new Checking account appears

test_cases.test_case: Open a Savings account with the exact minimum deposit amount
preconditions: A funding account with at least $100 exists
steps: 1. Navigate to Open New Account
2. Select the Savings account type card
3. Enter exactly 100 in the Initial Deposit Amount field
4. Select <funding account> from the Funding Source Account dropdown
5. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Account opened successfully!' and the user is redirected to Accounts Overview where the new Savings account appears

test_cases.test_case: Open an account with a non-numeric initial deposit
preconditions: A funding account with sufficient balance exists
steps: 1. Navigate to Open New Account
2. Select the Checking account type card
3. Enter 'abc' in the Initial Deposit Amount field
4. Select <funding account> from the Funding Source Account dropdown
5. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Initial Deposit Amount must be numeric' is displayed; no account is opened

test_cases.test_case: Transfer funds between two internal ParaBank accounts
preconditions: At least two Checking or Savings accounts exist with sufficient balance
steps: 1. Navigate to Transfer Funds from the left-hand menu
2. Select 'My ParaBank Account' as the transfer type
3. Enter <transfer amount> in the Transfer Amount field
4. Select <source account> from the Source Account dropdown
5. Select <destination account> from the destination dropdown
6. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Transfer completed successfully.' with a transaction ID; navigating to Accounts Overview shows the source account balance decreased and the destination account balance increased by the transfer amount

test_cases.test_case: Transfer funds to an external account with valid details
preconditions: A Checking or Savings account exists with sufficient balance
steps: 1. Navigate to Transfer Funds
2. Select 'External Account' as the transfer type
3. Enter <transfer amount> in the Transfer Amount field
4. Select <source account> from the Source Account dropdown
5. Enter a valid external account number in the Account Number field
6. Confirm the external account number
7. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Transfer completed successfully.' with a transaction ID; the source account balance decreased by the transfer amount

test_cases.test_case: Attempt a fund transfer with an amount exceeding the source account balance
preconditions: A Checking or Savings account exists with a known balance
steps: 1. Navigate to Transfer Funds
2. Select 'My ParaBank Account' as the transfer type
3. Enter an amount greater than the source account balance
4. Select the source and a destination account
5. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Insufficient funds' is displayed; no transfer is processed

test_cases.test_case: Attempt a fund transfer to an external account with mismatched account numbers
preconditions: A Checking or Savings account exists with sufficient balance
steps: 1. Navigate to Transfer Funds
2. Select 'External Account' as the transfer type
3. Enter <transfer amount> in the Transfer Amount field
4. Select <source account> from the Source Account dropdown
5. Enter a valid external account number in the Account Number field
6. Enter a different number in the Confirm Account Number field
7. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Account numbers do not match' is displayed; no transfer is processed

test_cases.test_case: Transfer funds with the exact balance of the source account
preconditions: A Checking or Savings account exists with a known balance
steps: 1. Navigate to Transfer Funds
2. Select 'My ParaBank Account' as the transfer type
3. Enter the exact balance amount in the Transfer Amount field
4. Select the source and a destination account
5. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Transfer completed successfully.' with a transaction ID; the source account balance is now zero and the destination account balance increased by the transfer amount

test_cases.test_case: Transfer funds with a very large amount within system limits
preconditions: A Checking or Savings account exists with sufficient balance
steps: 1. Navigate to Transfer Funds
2. Select 'My ParaBank Account' as the transfer type
3. Enter a very large amount (e.g., maximum allowed) in the Transfer Amount field
4. Select the source and a destination account
5. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Transfer completed successfully.' with a transaction ID; the source account balance decreased by the transfer amount

test_cases.test_case: Submit a valid bill payment
preconditions: User has a valid source account with sufficient funds
steps: 1. Navigate to the Payments page
2. Enter a valid Payee Name
3. Enter a valid Street Address
4. Enter a valid City
5. Select a valid State from the dropdown
6. Enter a valid ZIP Code
7. Enter a valid Phone Number
8. Enter a valid Payee Account Number
9. Enter the same Payee Account Number in the Confirm Account Number field
10. Enter a valid Payment Amount that is less than or equal to the available balance
11. Select a Source Account from the dropdown
12. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Payment submitted successfully.' with a reference code; the source account balance is updated accordingly

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to submit a bill payment with mismatched account numbers
preconditions: User has a valid source account with sufficient funds
steps: 1. Navigate to the Payments page
2. Enter a valid Payee Name
3. Enter a valid Street Address
4. Enter a valid City
5. Select a valid State from the dropdown
6. Enter a valid ZIP Code
7. Enter a valid Phone Number
8. Enter a valid Payee Account Number
9. Enter a different Payee Account Number in the Confirm Account Number field
10. Enter a valid Payment Amount
11. Select a Source Account from the dropdown
12. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Account numbers do not match' is displayed; the form remains editable

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to submit a bill payment with insufficient funds
preconditions: User has a valid source account with insufficient funds
steps: 1. Navigate to the Payments page
2. Enter a valid Payee Name
3. Enter a valid Street Address
4. Enter a valid City
5. Select a valid State from the dropdown
6. Enter a valid ZIP Code
7. Enter a valid Phone Number
8. Enter a valid Payee Account Number
9. Enter the same Payee Account Number in the Confirm Account Number field
10. Enter a Payment Amount greater than the available balance
11. Select a Source Account from the dropdown
12. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Insufficient funds' is displayed; the form remains editable

test_cases.test_case: Submit a bill payment with the maximum length of input fields
preconditions: User has a valid source account with sufficient funds
steps: 1. Navigate to the Payments page
2. Enter a Payee Name with maximum allowed characters
3. Enter a Street Address with maximum allowed characters
4. Enter a City with maximum allowed characters
5. Select a valid State from the dropdown
6. Enter a ZIP Code with maximum allowed characters
7. Enter a Phone Number with maximum allowed characters
8. Enter a Payee Account Number with maximum allowed characters
9. Enter the same Payee Account Number in the Confirm Account Number field
10. Enter a valid Payment Amount that is less than or equal to the available balance
11. Select a Source Account from the dropdown
12. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Payment submitted successfully.' with a reference code; the source account balance is updated accordingly

test_cases.test_case: Request a Personal loan within the valid range
steps: 1. Navigate to Request Loan
2. Select Personal loan type card
3. Enter 20000 in the Loan Amount field
4. Enter 2000 in the Down Payment Amount field
5. Select a collateral account from the dropdown
6. Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Loan approved and created successfully!' with account details

test_cases.test_case: Request a loan with a down payment less than 10% of the loan amount
steps: 1. Navigate to Request Loan
2. Select Auto loan type card
3. Enter 10000 in the Loan Amount field
4. Enter 500 in the Down Payment Amount field
5. Select a collateral account from the dropdown
6. Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Minimum down payment requirement is 10%' is displayed; loan request is not processed

test_cases.test_case: Request a Home loan with the exact minimum down payment
steps: 1. Navigate to Request Loan
2. Select Home loan type card
3. Enter 500000 in the Loan Amount field
4. Enter 10000 in the Down Payment Amount field
5. Select a collateral account from the dropdown
6. Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Loan approved and created successfully!' with account details

test_cases.test_case: Request a loan with insufficient collateral value
steps: 1. Navigate to Request Loan
2. Select Auto loan type card
3. Enter 30000 in the Loan Amount field
4. Enter 3000 in the Down Payment Amount field
5. Select a collateral account with less than 20% of the loan amount value
6. Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Inadequate collateral value' is displayed; loan request is not processed

test_cases.test_case: Request a loan with the maximum allowable loan amount
steps: 1. Navigate to Request Loan
2. Select Home loan type card
3. Enter 500000 in the Loan Amount field
4. Enter 10000 in the Down Payment Amount field
5. Select a collateral account from the dropdown
6. Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Loan approved and created successfully!' with account details

test_cases.test_case: Update contact information with valid data
preconditions: User is on the customer profile page
steps: 1. Navigate to the customer profile page
2. Edit the First Name field to 'John'
3. Edit the Last Name field to 'Doe'
4. Edit the Street Address field to '123 Main St'
5. Edit the City field to 'Anytown'
6. Edit the State field to 'CA'
7. Edit the ZIP Code field to '90210'
8. Edit the Phone Number field to '(123) 456-7890'
9. Click the 'Update Profile' button
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Profile updated successfully.' and the updated contact information is displayed

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to update contact information with an invalid ZIP Code
preconditions: User is on the customer profile page
steps: 1. Navigate to the customer profile page
2. Edit the ZIP Code field to '1234'
3. Click the 'Update Profile' button
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error banner is displayed highlighting the ZIP Code field as invalid; the profile is not updated

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to update contact information with missing required fields
preconditions: User is on the customer profile page
steps: 1. Navigate to the customer profile page
2. Clear the First Name field
3. Click the 'Update Profile' button
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error banner is displayed highlighting the First Name field as required; the profile is not updated

test_cases.test_case: Update contact information with maximum length fields
preconditions: User is on the customer profile page
steps: 1. Navigate to the customer profile page
2. Edit the First Name field to 'A very long first name that exceeds typical length'
3. Edit the Last Name field to 'A very long last name that exceeds typical length'
4. Edit the Street Address field to '123 A very long street address that exceeds typical length'
5. Edit the City field to 'A very long city name that exceeds typical length'
6. Edit the State field to 'California'
7. Edit the ZIP Code field to '90210'
8. Edit the Phone Number field to '(123) 456-7890'
9. Click the 'Update Profile' button
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Profile updated successfully.' and the updated contact information is displayed, assuming the system accepts the maximum lengths

test_cases.test_case: Request a new Debit card with valid details
preconditions: User has a valid account in good standing
User has a complete shipping address
steps: 1. Navigate to Manage Cards
2. Select 'Debit' as the Card Type
3. Select an account to link from the dropdown
4. Enter a complete shipping address
5. Click 'Request Card'
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Card request submitted successfully.' with a tracking ID

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to request a card with an incomplete shipping address
preconditions: User has a valid account in good standing
steps: 1. Navigate to Manage Cards
2. Select 'Credit' as the Card Type
3. Select an account to link from the dropdown
4. Enter an incomplete shipping address
5. Click 'Request Card'
test_cases.expected_result: An error message indicating 'Shipping address is incomplete' is displayed; no card request is submitted

test_cases.test_case: Request a new Credit card with maximum allowed shipping address length
preconditions: User has a valid account in good standing
steps: 1. Navigate to Manage Cards
2. Select 'Credit' as the Card Type
3. Select an account to link from the dropdown
4. Enter a shipping address with the maximum allowed character length
5. Click 'Request Card'
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Card request submitted successfully.' with a tracking ID

test_cases.test_case: Update card controls with valid new spending limit
steps: 1. Navigate to Manage Cards
2. Select an existing card from the dropdown
3. Enter a valid new spending limit within policy
4. Click 'Update Controls'
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Card controls updated successfully.'

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to update card controls with a spending limit above policy
steps: 1. Navigate to Manage Cards
2. Select an existing card from the dropdown
3. Enter a spending limit above the allowed maximum
4. Click 'Update Controls'
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error message indicating 'Spending limit exceeds policy' is displayed; form remains editable

test_cases.test_case: Update card controls with a spending limit of zero
steps: 1. Navigate to Manage Cards
2. Select an existing card from the dropdown
3. Enter '0' in the New Spending Limit field
4. Click 'Update Controls'
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error message indicating 'Spending limit cannot be zero' is displayed; form remains editable

test_cases.test_case: Execute a successful trade for a valid fund symbol
steps: 1. Navigate to the Investments page
2. Select 'Buy' from the Action dropdown
3. Enter a valid fund symbol in the Fund Symbol field
4. Enter a quantity greater than zero in the Quantity field
5. Select a funding account from the Funding Account dropdown
6. Click 'Execute Trade'
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Trade executed successfully.' with an order ID; portfolio snapshot updates to reflect new holdings

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to execute a trade with an invalid fund symbol
steps: 1. Navigate to the Investments page
2. Select 'Buy' from the Action dropdown
3. Enter an invalid fund symbol in the Fund Symbol field
4. Enter a valid quantity greater than zero
5. Select a funding account from the Funding Account dropdown
6. Click 'Execute Trade'
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error message 'Fund symbol does not exist' is displayed; no trade is executed

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to execute a trade with insufficient buying power
steps: 1. Navigate to the Investments page
2. Select 'Buy' from the Action dropdown
3. Enter a valid fund symbol in the Fund Symbol field
4. Enter a quantity that exceeds the buying power
5. Select a funding account from the Funding Account dropdown
6. Click 'Execute Trade'
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error message 'Insufficient buying power' is displayed; no trade is executed

test_cases.test_case: Execute a trade with the maximum allowable quantity
steps: 1. Navigate to the Investments page
2. Select 'Buy' from the Action dropdown
3. Enter a valid fund symbol in the Fund Symbol field
4. Enter the maximum allowable quantity in the Quantity field
5. Select a funding account from the Funding Account dropdown
6. Click 'Execute Trade'
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Trade executed successfully.' with an order ID; portfolio snapshot updates to reflect new holdings

test_cases.test_case: Create a recurring investment plan with valid inputs
preconditions: User has sufficient balance in the funding account
steps: 1. Navigate to the Investments page
2. Enter a valid fund symbol in the Fund Symbol field
3. Enter a valid contribution amount in the Contribution Amount field
4. Select 'Weekly' or 'Monthly' from the Frequency dropdown
5. Enter a future date in the Start Date field
6. Select a funding account from the Funding Account dropdown
7. Click 'Create Plan'
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Plan created successfully.'; the recurring investment plan appears in the user's plans

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to create a recurring investment plan with a past start date
preconditions: User has sufficient balance in the funding account
steps: 1. Navigate to the Investments page
2. Enter a valid fund symbol in the Fund Symbol field
3. Enter a valid contribution amount in the Contribution Amount field
4. Select 'Weekly' or 'Monthly' from the Frequency dropdown
5. Enter a past date in the Start Date field
6. Select a funding account from the Funding Account dropdown
7. Click 'Create Plan'
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error message 'Start date must be in the future' is displayed; no plan is created

test_cases.test_case: Create a recurring investment plan with the minimum contribution amount
preconditions: User has sufficient balance in the funding account
steps: 1. Navigate to the Investments page
2. Enter a valid fund symbol in the Fund Symbol field
3. Enter the minimum contribution amount in the Contribution Amount field
4. Select 'Weekly' or 'Monthly' from the Frequency dropdown
5. Enter a future date in the Start Date field
6. Select a funding account from the Funding Account dropdown
7. Click 'Create Plan'
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Plan created successfully.'; the recurring investment plan appears in the user's plans

test_cases.test_case: Generate a statement for a valid date range
preconditions: At least one account exists with transactions in the selected date range
steps: 1. Navigate to the Statements page
2. Select a valid month-and-year or custom date range in the Statement Period field
3. Select an account from the Account dropdown
4. Click Generate Statement
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Statement generated successfully.' and displays the relevant transactions for the selected period

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to generate a statement with an invalid date range
steps: 1. Navigate to the Statements page
2. Enter an invalid date range in the Statement Period field
3. Select an account from the Account dropdown
4. Click Generate Statement
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Unable to generate statement — please try again later.' is displayed; no statement is generated

test_cases.test_case: Generate a statement for the maximum date range
preconditions: At least one account exists with transactions spanning the maximum date range
steps: 1. Navigate to the Statements page
2. Select the maximum allowable date range in the Statement Period field
3. Select an account from the Account dropdown
4. Click Generate Statement
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Statement generated successfully.' and displays the relevant transactions for the maximum date range

test_cases.test_case: Update e-statement preference with a valid email address
steps: 1. Navigate to the Statements page
2. Check the checkbox to opt into paperless statements
3. Enter a valid email address in the Email Address field
4. Click Save Preference
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'e-Statement preference updated.' and the preference is saved

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to update e-statement preference with an invalid email address
steps: 1. Navigate to the Statements page
2. Check the checkbox to opt into paperless statements
3. Enter an invalid email address in the Email Address field
4. Click Save Preference
test_cases.expected_result: The email field is highlighted with guidance on the valid email format; preference is not updated

test_cases.test_case: Update e-statement preference with an email address at maximum length
steps: 1. Navigate to the Statements page
2. Check the checkbox to opt into paperless statements
3. Enter an email address with the maximum allowed length in the Email Address field
4. Click Save Preference
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'e-Statement preference updated.' and the preference is saved

test_cases.test_case: Change password with valid current and new passwords
steps: 1. Navigate to Security Settings
2. Enter valid current password in the Current Password field
3. Enter a strong new password in the New Password field
4. Confirm the new password in the Confirm New Password field
5. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Password changed successfully.'

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to change password with incorrect current password
preconditions: User knows the correct current password
steps: 1. Navigate to Security Settings
2. Enter an incorrect current password in the Current Password field
3. Enter a strong new password in the New Password field
4. Confirm the new password in the Confirm New Password field
5. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'Current password is incorrect' is displayed; password is not changed.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to change password with non-matching new passwords
steps: 1. Navigate to Security Settings
2. Enter valid current password in the Current Password field
3. Enter a strong new password in the New Password field
4. Enter a different password in the Confirm New Password field
5. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: An error message 'New passwords do not match' is displayed; password is not changed.

test_cases.test_case: Change password with the maximum length for new password
steps: 1. Navigate to Security Settings
2. Enter valid current password in the Current Password field
3. Enter a new password with the maximum allowed length in the New Password field
4. Confirm the new password in the Confirm New Password field
5. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Password changed successfully.'

test_cases.test_case: Change password with a weak password that meets length requirement
steps: 1. Navigate to Security Settings
2. Enter valid current password in the Current Password field
3. Enter a weak password (e.g., 'password123') in the New Password field
4. Confirm the weak password in the Confirm New Password field
5. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: An error message indicating 'Password does not meet strength requirements' is displayed; password is not changed.

test_cases.test_case: Send a secure message with valid inputs
steps: 1. Navigate to the Support Center page
2. Select 'Account' from the Category dropdown
3. Enter a valid subject in the Subject field
4. Enter a message in the Message Body field
5. Optionally attach a valid file
6. Click the 'Send Message' button
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Message sent successfully.' with a ticket ID

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to send a secure message without a message body
steps: 1. Navigate to the Support Center page
2. Select 'Technical' from the Category dropdown
3. Enter a valid subject in the Subject field
4. Leave the Message Body field empty
5. Click the 'Send Message' button
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error message indicates 'Message body is required.'; no message is sent

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to send a secure message with an invalid attachment type
steps: 1. Navigate to the Support Center page
2. Select 'Other' from the Category dropdown
3. Enter a valid subject in the Subject field
4. Enter a message in the Message Body field
5. Attach an invalid file type (e.g., .exe)
6. Click the 'Send Message' button
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error message indicates 'Invalid attachment type.'; no message is sent

test_cases.test_case: Send a secure message with the maximum allowed subject length
steps: 1. Navigate to the Support Center page
2. Select 'Security' from the Category dropdown
3. Enter a subject with the maximum allowed length (e.g., 255 characters)
4. Enter a message in the Message Body field
5. Click the 'Send Message' button
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Message sent successfully.' with a ticket ID

test_cases.test_case: Request a callback with valid inputs
steps: 1. Navigate to the Support Center page
2. Select a reason for the call from the Reason for Call dropdown
3. Enter a valid date that is at least the next business day
4. Select a preferred time window
5. Verify the Phone Number field is pre-filled and editable
6. Click the 'Request Callback' button
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Callback request submitted.' and an email confirmation is sent

test_cases.test_case: Request a callback with an invalid phone number format
steps: 1. Navigate to the Support Center page
2. Select a reason for the call from the Reason for Call dropdown
3. Enter a valid date that is at least the next business day
4. Select a preferred time window
5. Enter an invalid phone number format (e.g., '12345')
6. Click the 'Request Callback' button
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error message indicates 'Invalid phone number format.'; no callback request is submitted

test_cases.test_case: Request a callback for the earliest possible date
steps: 1. Navigate to the Support Center page
2. Select a reason for the call from the Reason for Call dropdown
3. Enter tomorrow's date as the Preferred Date
4. Select a preferred time window
5. Click the 'Request Callback' button
test_cases.expected_result: Page shows 'Callback request submitted.' and an email confirmation is sent
